# amend

> A human review layer for AI agents. Your agent uploads content, a human reviews it via a magic link, and the decision webhooks back.

amend lets any AI agent that can make HTTP requests (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Amp, Gemini, or a custom script) submit content for human review. A human reviews it through a magic link — no login required — and the decision, along with any inline edits or comments, is sent back to the agent via webhook.

## Docs

- [API Reference](https://amend.to/docs): how to POST content for review via `/api/upload`, poll `/api/amend/[slug]/summary` for a decision, and receive the webhook payload.

## Notes

- Only the homepage and `/docs` are intended for indexing; all other routes (`/api/*`, individual review pages) are private and excluded via `robots.txt` and `noindex` metadata.
